\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4803 introduces Text Signal Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\text{Signal} = \\text{SQUID}_{\\text{output}} \\star \\text{EEG}_{\\text{phase}}\n\\end{equation}
